title: Pan-Seared Polish Sausages with Roasted Peppers
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring pan-seared Polish sausages paired with roasted peppers. Perfect for a quick and satisfying dinner.

ingredients.name: Polish sausages
ingredients.notes: any type of Polish sausage works well

ingredients.name: Padron peppers
ingredients.notes: or any other sweet pepper variety

instructions: Roast the Padron peppers in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until charred and tender.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Polish sausages to the skillet and sear until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the sausages to a plate and let them rest.
Sauté the roasted peppers in the same skillet with the pan drippings until caramelized and fragrant.
Serve the sausages with the roasted peppers and enjoy!
Optional: serve with crusty toast for a comforting meal.
